why_narrator_name_alone_is_insufficient: Narrator labels can collide and do not uniquely identify a hadith-family or a specific proof instance.
required_uniqueness_properties: Must distinguish same-narrator different hadiths and same hadith across different forms.
risk_if_done_badly: The owner will face ambiguity such as not knowing which حُمْران hadith is meant.

why_narrator_name_alone_is_insufficient: Human-friendly names alone are not stable enough for uniqueness.
required_uniqueness_properties: Canonical source family, internal locator, and disambiguating opening text or normalized key.

why_narrator_name_alone_is_insufficient: One hadith-family can have multiple versions; one identifier should not collapse them improperly.
required_uniqueness_properties: Unique family key plus explicit variant or wording key.
risk_if_done_badly: Version confusion and failed proof comparisons.

why_narrator_name_alone_is_insufficient: The owner explicitly rejects any ambiguity while studying.
required_uniqueness_properties: Readable, unambiguous, and stable across the library.
risk_if_done_badly: Lost time, lost confidence, and wrong proof recall.
